checkpointing.strategy: After each authoritative completed week, export the live session state to disk via `workflow:phase11:checkpoint:export`. If browser continuity fails, restore the latest checkpoint into the named session before replaying from onboarding.

slice_policy.default_goal: Advance exactly one completed in-game week for the active persona unless a major blocker or especially high-signal audit event happens first.
slice_policy.detail_log_policy: Write one canonical per-slice detail file per completed week and keep the progress report concise.

next_slice: Advance Persona A through Week 3 from the week-02 checkpoint. Objective: push toward 500 Credits for Education Level 1 while protecting the reduced sanity buffer after the Week 2 laceration event.

last_run.outcome: Week 2 complete from live continuity. Final authoritative state: Turn 3, Hab-Pod 404, 345 Credits, Hunger 40, Sanity 27 after Scrap Metal triggered Tetanus-Grade Laceration.
